headline: Fertilizer Maker Trounces Earnings On High Profits Due To Hormuz Closure
summary: Fertilizer producer CF Industries breezed past expectations for revenue and profits on Wednesday. The stock rose 30% in March when Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz, which led to a global supply shortage.
